system.damage: from a item or amount. tags by HP, but w/disadvantage)
system.specialQuality: flies, harmed only by magical weapons, salt, or lead
system.moves:
- Manifest a vortex of churning wind, grit, and debris
- Engulf a smaller foe (+grabby)
- Carry an engulfed foe aloft (costs 1d4 HP)
- Fling objects (+near; costs 1d4 HP)
- Flee when hurt, frightened, or bored

A wind matrix absorbs power from moving air. It gains 1d4 HP from weeks exposed to normal weather, an hour in high winds, or a minute or so in a tornado. When you strike a wind vortex with a salt or lead, it takes 1d4 damage from a hand- ful, 2d4 damage from a item, and 3d4
